prose: The frontier-orbital computations for pyridine were completed using DFT at the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set (labeled as tier 'standard') in the gas phase, employing PySCF as the quantum-mechanical backend. The HOMO–LUMO gap was calculated to be 6.1398 eV, with SCF convergence achieved in 10 cycles (converged: true). Geometric input derived from the file located at /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz; no external solvation effects were considered. The full live calculation log remained available at /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpi4fwddf4/live.json for transparency of electronic steps.
